body_txt: Sometimes simply holding a weapon just isn't cool enough. Some characters just have to have weapons in the most unexpected places, like on their shoulder, on their head, or even inside a limb. Maybe they just have so much dakka that they can't fit any more weapons in conventional places. Or maybe they're just weird. They may be: Compare Natural Weapons for when they're already part of the wielder, Handy Feet for doing things with your feet (including wielding a weapon) when they normally would require your hands, and Backpack Cannon for weapons mounted in/from a backpack (i.e behind your back). See Phallic Weapon if the weapon's placement is suggestive.
